prophecies.q: 1956年《Parade》杂志预言
prophecies.a: 1960年的大选将由一位民主党人赢得，而他将在任内遭到暗杀或死于任上。
prophecies.q_en: 1956 Parade magazine prediction
prophecies.a_en: The 1960 election will be won by a Democrat, and he will be assassinated or die in office.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1960年约翰·F·肯尼迪（民主党）赢得总统大选，1963年11月22日在达拉斯遇刺身亡。这是狄克逊最著名的预言，也是「狄克逊效应」的核心案例。但需注意，她在1960年大选前又改口预测尼克松会赢。
prophecies.verdict_en: John F. Kennedy (Democrat) won the 1960 election and was assassinated on November 22, 1963 in Dallas. This is Dixon's most famous prediction and the core case of the 'Jeane Dixon effect'. However, she later reversed course before the 1960 election, predicting Nixon would win.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访或著作中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews or her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言第三次世界大战
prophecies.a: 1958年中国沿海岛屿的冲突将引发第三次世界大战。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted World War III
prophecies.a_en: The conflict over China's offshore islands in 1958 will trigger World War III.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1958年确实发生了台海危机（八二三炮战），中国大陆炮击金门，但并未引发第三次世界大战。冲突在数周内平息，美国虽派遣舰队但避免了直接军事对抗。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 1958 Taiwan Strait Crisis (Second Taiwan Strait Crisis) did occur, with mainland China shelling Kinmen, but it did not trigger World War III. The conflict subsided within weeks, and while the US deployed naval forces, direct military confrontation was avoided.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访或著作中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews or her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言中国大规模军事行动
prophecies.a: 中国将在1958年对东南亚发动大规模进攻，引发世界性冲突。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted Chinese military offensive
prophecies.a_en: China will launch a massive offensive into Southeast Asia in 1958, sparking a global conflict.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 中国并未在1958年对东南亚发动进攻，也未引发世界性冲突。1958年中国的主要军事行动是炮击金门，属于台海局部冲突。
prophecies.verdict_en: China did not launch an offensive into Southeast Asia in 1958, nor did any global conflict ensue. China's main military action in 1958 was the shelling of Kinmen, a localized Taiwan Strait conflict.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访或著作中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews or her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言苏联会率先将人送入太空
prophecies.a: 苏联将在太空竞赛中领先于美国，率先将人送入太空轨道。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted the USSR would send humans to space first
prophecies.a_en: The Soviet Union will lead the United States in the space race by sending a human into orbit first.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1961年4月12日，苏联宇航员尤里·加加林成为第一个进入太空的人类，乘坐东方一号飞船完成了地球轨道飞行。美国直到1962年2月约翰·格伦才完成首次轨道飞行。
prophecies.verdict_en: On April 12, 1961, Soviet cosmonaut Yuri Gagarin became the first human in space, orbiting Earth aboard Vostok 1. The US didn't achieve orbital flight until John Glenn in February 1962.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访或著作中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews or her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言尼克松将参加1964年大选
prophecies.a: 理查德·尼克松将在1964年再次竞选总统。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted Nixon would run in 1964
prophecies.a_en: Richard Nixon will run for president again in 1964.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 尼克松在1962年竞选加州州长失败后宣布退出政坛，并未参加1964年总统大选。1964年共和党提名的是巴里·戈德华特。尼克松直到1968年才再次竞选并当选总统。
prophecies.verdict_en: Nixon lost the 1962 California governor's race and declared he was leaving politics. He did not run in the 1964 presidential election — the Republican nominee was Barry Goldwater. Nixon did not run again until 1968, when he won.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访或著作中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews or her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言1960年大选结果（改口版）
prophecies.a: 1960年总统大选将由共和党候选人理查德·尼克松赢得。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon's revised 1960 election prediction
prophecies.a_en: The 1960 presidential election will be won by Republican candidate Richard Nixon.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1960年大选由民主党人约翰·F·肯尼迪以极微弱优势（0.17%）击败尼克松当选总统。讽刺的是，狄克逊1956年的原始预言（民主党人赢得大选）反而是正确的，但她在大选前改口预测尼克松获胜，结果反而错了。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 1960 election was won by Democrat John F. Kennedy, who defeated Nixon by a razor-thin margin (0.17%). Ironically, Dixon's original 1956 prediction (a Democrat winning) was correct, but she reversed her prediction before the election to favor Nixon, and got it wrong.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访或著作中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews or her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言印中战争
prophecies.a: 中国将与印度发生军事冲突。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted Sino-Indian war
prophecies.a_en: China will engage in military conflict with India.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1962年10-11月中印边境战争爆发，中国军队在短暂但激烈的冲突中击败印度军队。这场战争改变了亚洲地缘政治格局。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Sino-Indian War erupted in October-November 1962, with Chinese forces defeating Indian troops in a brief but intense conflict. This war reshaped Asian geopolitics.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访或著作中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews or her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言联合国秘书长去世
prophecies.a: 联合国秘书长达格·哈马舍尔德将在非洲遭遇不幸。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted the UN Secretary-General's death
prophecies.a_en: UN Secretary-General Dag Hammarskjöld will meet with misfortune in Africa.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1961年9月18日，联合国秘书长达格·哈马舍尔德在前往刚果调停冲突途中飞机坠毁身亡。至今坠机原因仍有争议。
prophecies.verdict_en: UN Secretary-General Dag Hammarskjöld died in a plane crash on September 18, 1961, while traveling to mediate the Congo crisis. The cause of the crash remains disputed.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访或著作中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews or her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言「东方之子」降世
prophecies.a: 1962年2月5日，一位在中东降生的孩子将彻底改变世界，他将统一所有宗教，在2000年前建立世界和平。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted the 'Child from the East'
prophecies.a_en: On February 5, 1962, a child born in the Middle East will revolutionize the world, uniting all religions and establishing world peace before the year 2000.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 没有任何公开可查的人物符合此预言的描述。2000年前世界并未实现宗教统一或世界和平。这是狄克逊最宏大也最具争议的预言之一，她后来多次修改此预言的细节。
prophecies.verdict_en: No publicly known individual matches this prediction. The world did not achieve religious unity or world peace before 2000. This is one of Dixon's most grandiose and controversial predictions, and she revised its details multiple times over the years.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访或著作中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews or her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言苏联率先登月
prophecies.a: 苏联将率先把人送上月球。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted Soviet moon landing first
prophecies.a_en: The Soviet Union will be the first to put a man on the moon.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1969年7月20日，美国阿波罗11号的尼尔·阿姆斯特朗成为第一个登上月球的人。苏联从未实现载人登月。这是狄克逊最知名的错误预言之一。
prophecies.verdict_en: On July 20, 1969, Neil Armstrong of the US Apollo 11 mission became the first person to walk on the moon. The Soviet Union never achieved a crewed moon landing. This is one of Dixon's most notable failed predictions.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访或著作中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews or her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言沃尔特·鲁瑟将竞选总统
prophecies.a: 全美汽车工人联合会主席沃尔特·鲁瑟将积极参选总统。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted Walter Reuther's presidential run
prophecies.a_en: United Auto Workers president Walter Reuther will actively run for president.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 沃尔特·鲁瑟从未竞选总统。他一直担任全美汽车工人联合会主席直到1970年因飞机失事去世，期间从未参与总统竞选。
prophecies.verdict_en: Walter Reuther never ran for president. He served as UAW president until his death in a plane crash in 1970, never entering a presidential race.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访或著作中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews or her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言卡斯特罗政权垮台
prophecies.a: 菲德尔·卡斯特罗将在1966年前被推翻并被迫离开古巴。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted Castro's overthrow
prophecies.a_en: Fidel Castro will be overthrown and forced to leave Cuba before 1966.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 菲德尔·卡斯特罗未被推翻，他统治古巴长达49年，直到2008年因健康原因将权力移交给弟弟劳尔·卡斯特罗。卡斯特罗于2016年去世，终年90岁。
prophecies.verdict_en: Fidel Castro was never overthrown. He ruled Cuba for 49 years until transferring power to his brother Raúl Castro in 2008 due to health reasons. Castro died in 2016 at age 90.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访或著作中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews or her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言癌症治愈
prophecies.a: 到1967年，人类将找到癌症的治愈方法。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted cancer cure
prophecies.a_en: By 1967, a cure for cancer will be found.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2026年，癌症仍未被完全治愈。虽然免疫疗法、靶向治疗等技术取得了重大突破，许多癌症的生存率大幅提高，但人类距离「治愈癌症」仍然很远。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of 2026, cancer has not been cured. While immunotherapy, targeted therapy, and other advances have significantly improved survival rates for many cancers, a universal cure for cancer remains elusive.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访或著作中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews or her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言印中边境冲突
prophecies.a: 中国与印度之间将爆发大规模军事冲突。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted Sino-Indian conflict
prophecies.a_en: A large-scale military conflict will erupt between China and India.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1962年10月至11月确实爆发了中印边境战争，中国军队在短暂冲突中取得胜利后单方面停火。狄克逊预言了中印冲突的发生，但实际冲突规模有限且持续时间很短（约一个月），并非「大规模」军事冲突。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Sino-Indian War did occur from October to November 1962, with China winning a brief conflict before declaring a unilateral ceasefire. Dixon correctly predicted a Sino-Indian conflict, but the actual war was limited in scale and duration (about one month), not the 'large-scale' conflict she described.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访或著作中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews or her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言古巴导弹危机
prophecies.a: 美苏之间将因加勒比海地区发生严重对抗，世界将面临核战争的威胁。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted the Cuban Missile Crisis
prophecies.a_en: A serious confrontation between the US and USSR will occur in the Caribbean, threatening the world with nuclear war.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1962年10月古巴导弹危机是冷战中最接近核战争的时刻。苏联在古巴部署核导弹，肯尼迪实施海上封锁，经过13天的紧张对峙后双方达成协议。
prophecies.verdict_en: The October 1962 Cuban Missile Crisis was the closest the Cold War came to nuclear war. The USSR deployed nuclear missiles in Cuba, Kennedy imposed a naval blockade, and after 13 tense days, both sides reached an agreement.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访中提到了该事件
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this event in interviews

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言教皇约翰二十三世的继任者
prophecies.a: 教皇约翰二十三世之后将由一位保守派教皇继任。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted Pope John XXIII's successor
prophecies.a_en: Pope John XXIII will be succeeded by a conservative pope.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 教皇约翰二十三世于1963年去世后，保罗六世继任。保罗六世在某些方面确实比其前任更为保守（如1968年《人类生命》通谕反对避孕），但他也延续了梵二会议的改革路线，不能简单归类为「保守派」。
prophecies.verdict_en: After Pope John XXIII's death in 1963, Paul VI succeeded him. Paul VI was in some respects more conservative than his predecessor (e.g., the 1968 Humanae Vitae encyclical opposing contraception), but he also continued Vatican II reforms and cannot simply be classified as 'conservative'.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访或著作中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews or her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言赫鲁晓夫被推翻
prophecies.a: 苏联领导人赫鲁晓夫将在内部政变中被推翻。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted Khrushchev's ouster
prophecies.a_en: Soviet leader Khrushchev will be overthrown in an internal coup.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1964年10月14日，赫鲁晓夫在缺席情况下被苏共中央主席团投票免职，由勃列日涅夫接任。这是一次成功的内部政变。
prophecies.verdict_en: On October 14, 1964, Khrushchev was voted out of office by the Presidium of the CPSU Central Committee in his absence, replaced by Brezhnev. This was a successful internal coup.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访或著作中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews or her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言越战结局
prophecies.a: 越南战争将在1966年结束。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted end of Vietnam War
prophecies.a_en: The Vietnam War will end in 1966.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 越南战争并未在1966年结束，实际上美国在1966年后持续升级了对越南的军事介入。战争直到1975年4月30日西贡陷落才最终结束，比狄克逊的预言晚了9年。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Vietnam War did not end in 1966. In fact, the US escalated military involvement after 1966. The war did not end until the Fall of Saigon on April 30, 1975, nine years after Dixon's prediction.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访或著作中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews or her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言丘吉尔的去世
prophecies.a: 温斯顿·丘吉尔将在1965年初去世。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted Churchill's death
prophecies.a_en: Winston Churchill will die in early 1965.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 温斯顿·丘吉尔于1965年1月24日去世，享年90岁。
prophecies.verdict_en: Winston Churchill died on January 24, 1965, at the age of 90.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访或著作中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews or her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言越南战争将持续很长时间
prophecies.a: 美国将陷入越南的泥潭。这场战争将远比政府预期的更加漫长和痛苦。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted the Vietnam War would last a long time
prophecies.a_en: America will become mired in Vietnam. The war will be far longer and more painful than the government expects.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 美国在越南战争中从1964年全面介入到1975年最终撤离，历时超过10年。战争造成约5.8万美国军人死亡，远超最初预期。
prophecies.verdict_en: US full involvement in Vietnam lasted from 1964 until final withdrawal in 1975, over 10 years. About 58,000 American servicemen died, far exceeding initial expectations.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访或著作中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews or her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言苏联将称霸世界
prophecies.a: 苏联将在军事和科技上全面超越美国，成为世界最强国家。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted USSR supremacy
prophecies.a_en: The Soviet Union will surpass the United States in military and technology, becoming the world's most powerful nation.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 苏联不仅未能超越美国，反而在1991年12月25日正式解体，冷战以美国及西方阵营的胜利告终。苏联解体后分裂为15个独立国家。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Soviet Union not only failed to surpass the US but officially dissolved on December 25, 1991. The Cold War ended with the victory of the US and the Western bloc. The USSR split into 15 independent nations.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访或著作中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews or her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言中国将成为共产主义的威胁
prophecies.a: 中国将取代苏联成为世界上最大的共产主义威胁。中美关系将在未来数十年成为世界政治的核心议题。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted China would become the communist threat
prophecies.a_en: China will replace the Soviet Union as the world's greatest communist threat. US-China relations will become the central issue of world politics for decades.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 苏联1991年解体后，中国确实成为世界上最大的共产主义国家。中美关系确实是21世纪最重要的地缘政治议题。但「威胁」的定性有争议——中国通过经济合作而非军事对抗成为大国。
prophecies.verdict_en: After the Soviet Union's 1991 collapse, China indeed became the world's largest communist state. US-China relations are indeed the most important geopolitical issue of the 21st century. But characterizing it as a 'threat' is debatable — China rose through economic engagement rather than military confrontation.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在著作中描述了该时间范围
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon described this timeframe in her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言菲德尔·卡斯特罗不会被推翻
prophecies.a: 古巴领导人卡斯特罗将长期掌权，所有企图推翻他的行动都将失败。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted Castro would not be overthrown
prophecies.a_en: Cuban leader Castro will remain in power long-term, and all attempts to overthrow him will fail.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 尽管美国发动了猪湾入侵（1961）和数百次暗杀企图，卡斯特罗统治古巴近50年，直到2008年因健康原因将权力移交给弟弟劳尔·卡斯特罗。他于2016年去世。
prophecies.verdict_en: Despite the Bay of Pigs invasion (1961) and hundreds of assassination attempts, Castro ruled Cuba for nearly 50 years until transferring power to his brother Raúl Castro in 2008 due to health issues. He died in 2016.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在著作中描述了该预言
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon described this prediction in her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言罗伯特·肯尼迪遇刺
prophecies.a: 罗伯特·F·肯尼迪将在竞选总统期间遭到暗杀。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted Robert Kennedy's assassination
prophecies.a_en: Robert F. Kennedy will be assassinated during his presidential campaign.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1968年6月5日，罗伯特·肯尼迪在洛杉矶大使酒店赢得加州民主党初选后被枪杀。次日去世。
prophecies.verdict_en: Robert F. Kennedy was shot at the Ambassador Hotel in Los Angeles on June 5, 1968, after winning the California Democratic primary. He died the following day.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访或著作中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews or her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言马丁·路德·金遇刺
prophecies.a: 马丁·路德·金博士将面临生命威胁，可能在1968年遭到暗杀。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted Martin Luther King Jr.'s assassination
prophecies.a_en: Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. will face a threat to his life and may be assassinated in 1968.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1968年4月4日，马丁·路德·金在田纳西州孟菲斯的洛林汽车旅馆阳台上被枪杀。
prophecies.verdict_en: Martin Luther King Jr. was shot and killed on the balcony of the Lorraine Motel in Memphis, Tennessee, on April 4, 1968.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访或著作中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews or her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言戴高乐将下台
prophecies.a: 法国总统戴高乐将失去权力，不再领导法国。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted de Gaulle would lose power
prophecies.a_en: French President de Gaulle will lose power and will no longer lead France.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1969年4月，戴高乐在全民公投失败后辞去法国总统职务。他在1970年去世。
prophecies.verdict_en: In April 1969, de Gaulle resigned as French President after losing a referendum. He died in 1970.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访或著作中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews or her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言罗伯特·肯尼迪遇难
prophecies.a: 罗伯特·F·肯尼迪将遭遇不测，面临严重的生命威胁。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted Robert Kennedy's fate
prophecies.a_en: Robert F. Kennedy will face grave danger, a serious threat to his life.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1968年6月5日，罗伯特·F·肯尼迪在洛杉矶大使酒店赢得加州初选后遭枪击，次日不治身亡。据传狄克逊在1968年初曾警告罗伯特·肯尼迪面临危险。但该预言的确切时间和措辞存在争议，部分来源认为是事后追溯。
prophecies.verdict_en: On June 5, 1968, Robert F. Kennedy was shot at the Ambassador Hotel in Los Angeles after winning the California primary and died the next day. Dixon reportedly warned of danger to RFK in early 1968. However, the exact timing and wording of this prediction are disputed, with some sources suggesting it was retrospectively attributed.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访或著作中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews or her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言尼克松将赢得1968年大选
prophecies.a: 理查德·尼克松将在1968年总统大选中获胜。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted Nixon would win the 1968 election
prophecies.a_en: Richard Nixon will win the 1968 presidential election.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 理查德·尼克松在1968年总统大选中击败民主党候选人休伯特·汉弗莱当选第37任美国总统。
prophecies.verdict_en: Richard Nixon defeated Democratic candidate Hubert Humphrey in the 1968 presidential election, becoming the 37th President.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访或著作中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews or her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言罗纳德·里根将当选总统
prophecies.a: 一位来自加利福尼亚的前演员将成为美国总统。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted Ronald Reagan would become president
prophecies.a_en: A former actor from California will become President of the United States.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 罗纳德·里根（前好莱坞演员，加州州长）于1980年当选美国第40任总统。
prophecies.verdict_en: Ronald Reagan (former Hollywood actor and California governor) was elected the 40th President in 1980.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访中描述了该时间范围
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon described this timeframe in interviews

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言女性将竞选总统
prophecies.a: 在21世纪初期，一位女性将成为美国总统候选人的有力竞争者。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted a woman would run for president
prophecies.a_en: In the early 21st century, a woman will become a strong contender for the US presidency.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2016年希拉里·克林顿成为美国两大政党首位女性总统候选人。2024年卡玛拉·哈里斯也作为民主党候选人参选。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 2016, Hillary Clinton became the first female presidential nominee of a major US party. In 2024, Kamala Harris also ran as the Democratic nominee.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在著作中描述了该时间范围
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon described this timeframe in her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言大规模自然灾害
prophecies.a: 美国西海岸将遭受严重的自然灾害。大地震和火灾将造成巨大破坏。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted massive natural disasters
prophecies.a_en: The US West Coast will suffer severe natural disasters. Major earthquakes and fires will cause enormous damage.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 加州持续遭受严重山火——2020年创纪录的火灾烧毁了超过400万英亩土地。2024年持续的干旱和山火威胁更甚。加州也面临大地震风险（圣安德烈亚斯断层）。
prophecies.verdict_en: California has suffered devastating wildfires — record fires in 2020 burned over 4 million acres. 2024 brought continued drought and wildfire threats. California also faces major earthquake risk (San Andreas Fault).
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在著作中描述了该预言
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon described this prediction in her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言女性将担任美国总统
prophecies.a: 一位女性将在1980年代末或1990年代初当选美国总统。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted a female US president
prophecies.a_en: A woman will be elected President of the United States in the late 1980s or early 1990s.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2026年，美国尚未选出女性总统。希拉里·克林顿在2016年赢得普选票但输掉选举人团，卡玛拉·哈里斯在2020年当选副总统，但总统职位从未由女性担任。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of 2026, the United States has not elected a female president. Hillary Clinton won the popular vote in 2016 but lost the Electoral College, and Kamala Harris became Vice President in 2020, but no woman has held the presidency.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访或著作中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews or her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言2020年后的灵性觉醒
prophecies.a: 「一个出生在中东的孩子将在21世纪建立一种新的信仰体系，统一世界的宗教。」
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted a spiritual awakening after 2020
prophecies.a_en: "A child born in the Middle East will establish a new belief system in the 21st century, unifying the world's religions."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2026年，没有出现任何来自中东的宗教领袖建立「新信仰体系」或统一世界宗教的迹象。全球宗教格局仍然多元分立。这被认为是狄克逊最不成功的预言之一。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of 2026, no Middle Eastern religious leader has established a 'new belief system' or unified world religions. The global religious landscape remains pluralistic. This is considered one of Dixon's most unsuccessful predictions.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在著作中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言水门事件的后果
prophecies.a: 尼克松总统将因丑闻而被迫离开白宫。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted Watergate consequences
prophecies.a_en: President Nixon will be forced to leave the White House due to scandal.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1974年8月9日，理查德·尼克松因水门事件丑闻成为美国历史上第一位辞职的总统，以避免被国会弹劾。
prophecies.verdict_en: On August 9, 1974, Richard Nixon became the first US president to resign, due to the Watergate scandal, to avoid Congressional impeachment.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访中提到了该事件
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this event in interviews

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言1976年大选失误
prophecies.a: 1976年总统大选将由共和党人赢得。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon incorrectly predicted the 1976 election
prophecies.a_en: The 1976 presidential election will be won by a Republican.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1976年民主党候选人吉米·卡特击败在任总统杰拉尔德·福特当选。这是狄克逊多次选举预测失误之一。
prophecies.verdict_en: Democrat Jimmy Carter defeated incumbent President Gerald Ford in 1976. This was one of Dixon's multiple election prediction failures.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言教皇约翰·保罗一世的突然去世
prophecies.a: 新当选的教皇将在位时间极短，他的去世将令世界震惊。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted Pope John Paul I's sudden death
prophecies.a_en: The newly elected Pope will serve an extremely short time, and his death will shock the world.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 教皇约翰·保罗一世于1978年8月26日就任，仅33天后的9月28日即突然去世。他是20世纪在位时间最短的教皇，死因至今存在争议。
prophecies.verdict_en: Pope John Paul I was inaugurated on August 26, 1978, and died suddenly on September 28, only 33 days later. He was the shortest-serving pope of the 20th century, and his cause of death remains disputed.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访中描述了该事件
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon described this event in interviews

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言苏联不会入侵伊朗
prophecies.a: 苏联将不会入侵伊朗，尽管边境局势紧张。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted the USSR would not invade Iran
prophecies.a_en: The Soviet Union will not invade Iran despite border tensions.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1979年伊朗革命后，许多人担心苏联会趁机入侵。但苏联没有入侵伊朗，而是选择在1979年12月入侵了阿富汗。
prophecies.verdict_en: After the 1979 Iranian Revolution, many feared Soviet invasion. But the USSR did not invade Iran, instead choosing to invade Afghanistan in December 1979.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访或著作中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews or her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言全球恐怖主义威胁
prophecies.a: 恐怖主义将成为21世纪世界面临的最大安全威胁之一。袭击将发生在世界各大城市。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted global terrorism threat
prophecies.a_en: Terrorism will become one of the greatest security threats the world faces in the 21st century. Attacks will occur in major cities worldwide.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2001年9/11恐怖袭击造成近3000人死亡，成为21世纪最具标志性的恐怖事件。此后伦敦（2005）、巴黎（2015）、布鲁塞尔（2016）等世界主要城市遭受恐怖袭击。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 9/11 attacks in 2001 killed nearly 3,000 people, becoming the most iconic terrorist event of the 21st century. London (2005), Paris (2015), Brussels (2016) and other major world cities subsequently suffered terrorist attacks.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在著作中描述了该时间范围
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon described this timeframe in her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言苏联将解体
prophecies.a: 苏联将不会永远存在。它最终会从内部瓦解，分裂为多个独立国家。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted the USSR would collapse
prophecies.a_en: The Soviet Union will not last forever. It will ultimately crumble from within, splitting into multiple independent nations.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1991年12月25日苏联正式解体，分裂为15个独立国家。解体源于内部经济危机、民族运动和政治改革——确实是「从内部瓦解」。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Soviet Union officially dissolved on December 25, 1991, splitting into 15 independent nations. The collapse stemmed from internal economic crisis, nationalist movements, and political reform — indeed 'crumbling from within'.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在著作中描述了该预言
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon described this prediction in her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言互联网时代
prophecies.a: 一种新的通信技术将使全世界的人能够瞬间交流信息。每个家庭都将拥有这种设备。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted the internet age
prophecies.a_en: A new communication technology will enable people worldwide to exchange information instantly. Every household will have this device.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 互联网在1990年代开始普及，2000年代渗透率快速增长。2024年全球约54亿互联网用户。智能手机使得每个家庭（乃至每个个人）都拥有了即时通信设备。
prophecies.verdict_en: The internet began spreading in the 1990s, with penetration growing rapidly in the 2000s. By 2024, there are about 5.4 billion internet users globally. Smartphones gave every household (and individual) instant communication devices.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在著作中描述了该时间范围
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon described this timeframe in her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言安瓦尔·萨达特遇刺
prophecies.a: 埃及总统萨达特将面临致命的攻击。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted Anwar Sadat's assassination
prophecies.a_en: Egyptian President Sadat will face a deadly attack.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1981年10月6日，埃及总统安瓦尔·萨达特在阅兵式上被伊斯兰极端分子枪杀。这是因为他与以色列签订和平协议而遭到极端分子的报复。
prophecies.verdict_en: Egyptian President Anwar Sadat was assassinated by Islamic extremists during a military parade on October 6, 1981, in retaliation for signing the peace agreement with Israel.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访中提到了该事件
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this event in interviews

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言教皇约翰·保罗二世遇刺未遂
prophecies.a: 教皇将遭到暗杀企图，但会幸存下来。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted the assassination attempt on Pope John Paul II
prophecies.a_en: The Pope will face an assassination attempt but will survive.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1981年5月13日，教皇约翰·保罗二世在圣彼得广场被土耳其枪手穆罕默德·阿里·阿卡开枪射中腹部，严重受伤但幸存。教皇后来探望并原谅了凶手。
prophecies.verdict_en: On May 13, 1981, Pope John Paul II was shot in the abdomen by Turkish gunman Mehmet Ali Ağca in St. Peter's Square. He was seriously wounded but survived. The Pope later visited and forgave his attacker.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访中提到了该事件
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this event in interviews

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言南非种族隔离将终结
prophecies.a: 南非的种族隔离制度将和平终结，一位黑人领导人将成为总统。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted the end of South African apartheid
prophecies.a_en: South Africa's apartheid system will end peacefully, and a black leader will become president.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1990年纳尔逊·曼德拉获释，1994年南非举行首次全民大选，曼德拉当选总统。种族隔离制度和平终结，避免了许多人预期的血腥内战。
prophecies.verdict_en: Nelson Mandela was released in 1990, and South Africa held its first universal election in 1994, with Mandela elected president. Apartheid ended peacefully, avoiding the bloody civil war many had expected.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在著作中描述了该预言
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon described this prediction in her published works

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言黛安娜王妃婚姻破裂
prophecies.a: 查尔斯王子与戴安娜的婚姻将以离婚告终。这段「童话婚姻」不会持久。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted Princess Diana's marriage would fail
prophecies.a_en: Prince Charles and Diana's marriage will end in divorce. This 'fairy tale marriage' will not last.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 查尔斯王子与戴安娜于1981年结婚，被称为「世纪婚礼」。1992年宣布分居，1996年正式离婚。戴安娜于1997年在巴黎车祸中去世。
prophecies.verdict_en: Prince Charles and Diana married in 1981 in the 'wedding of the century.' They separated in 1992 and officially divorced in 1996. Diana died in a Paris car crash in 1997.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访中描述了该预言
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon described this prediction in interviews

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言英迪拉·甘地遇刺
prophecies.a: 印度总理英迪拉·甘地将面临暗杀威胁。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted Indira Gandhi's assassination
prophecies.a_en: Indian Prime Minister Indira Gandhi will face an assassination threat.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1984年10月31日，印度总理英迪拉·甘地被两名锡克教徒保镖开枪射杀，原因是她下令军事进攻锡克教圣地阿姆利则金庙。
prophecies.verdict_en: On October 31, 1984, Indian Prime Minister Indira Gandhi was shot and killed by two Sikh bodyguards, in retaliation for her ordering a military assault on the Sikh holy shrine at Amritsar's Golden Temple.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访中提到了该事件
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this event in interviews

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言1984年大选失误
prophecies.a: 沃尔特·蒙代尔将给里根带来严峻挑战。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon incorrectly predicted the 1984 election
prophecies.a_en: Walter Mondale will pose a serious challenge to Reagan.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1984年罗纳德·里根以49个州的压倒性优势击败沃尔特·蒙代尔，赢得525张选举人票对13票。这是美国历史上最大的选举人票差距之一。蒙代尔并未构成「严峻挑战」。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 1984, Ronald Reagan defeated Walter Mondale in a landslide, winning 49 states with 525 electoral votes to 13. This was one of the largest Electoral College margins in US history. Mondale did not pose a 'serious challenge'.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访中明确提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this year in interviews

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言柏林墙倒塌
prophecies.a: 东西柏林之间的障碍将被拆除，德国将重新统一。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted the Berlin Wall would fall
prophecies.a_en: The barrier between East and West Berlin will be removed, and Germany will be reunified.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1989年11月9日柏林墙倒塌，1990年10月3日东西德正式统一。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Berlin Wall fell on November 9, 1989, and East and West Germany officially reunified on October 3, 1990.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访中描述了该事件
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon described this event in interviews

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言日本经济将衰退
prophecies.a: 日本在1980年代的经济奇迹不会永远持续。日本经济将在1990年代陷入严重停滞。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted Japan's economic decline
prophecies.a_en: Japan's 1980s economic miracle will not last forever. The Japanese economy will stagnate severely in the 1990s.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1990年日本资产泡沫破裂，日经指数从38916点（1989年底）暴跌。此后日本进入了长达30年的经济停滞期——被称为「失去的三十年」。
prophecies.verdict_en: Japan's asset bubble burst in 1990, with the Nikkei index crashing from 38,916 (late 1989). Japan then entered a 30-year period of economic stagnation — called the 'Lost Three Decades'.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访中描述了该时间范围
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon described this timeframe in interviews

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言海湾战争
prophecies.a: 美国将在中东的沙漠中发动一场短暂但激烈的战争。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted the Gulf War
prophecies.a_en: The United States will wage a brief but intense war in the deserts of the Middle East.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1991年1-2月，美国领导的联军在海湾战争中击败伊拉克。地面战只持续了100小时，但空袭阶段从1月17日持续到2月28日。这场战争确实「短暂但激烈」。
prophecies.verdict_en: In January-February 1991, US-led coalition forces defeated Iraq in the Gulf War. The ground war lasted only 100 hours, though the air campaign ran from January 17 to February 28. The war was indeed 'brief but intense'.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在采访中提到了该事件
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon mentioned this event in interviews

prophecies.q: 狄克逊预言2000年后全球经济动荡
prophecies.a: 21世纪初期，全球将经历多次严重的经济危机和金融动荡。
prophecies.q_en: Dixon predicted global economic turbulence after 2000
prophecies.a_en: In the early 21st century, the world will experience multiple severe economic crises and financial turbulence.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2001年互联网泡沫破裂，2008年全球金融危机（自大萧条以来最严重），2020年COVID-19导致全球经济衰退。21世纪确实经历了多次重大经济危机。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 2001 dot-com bubble burst, the 2008 global financial crisis (worst since the Great Depression), and the 2020 COVID-19 global recession. The 21st century has indeed experienced multiple major economic crises.
prophecies.yearReason: Jeane Dixon在著作中描述了该时间范围
prophecies.yearReason_en: Jeane Dixon described this timeframe in her published works
